# Hyvo.ai

> AI-powered streaming assistant for YouTube and Twitch creators — automated scheduling, real-time engagement, AI highlights, multi-platform streaming, and a native desktop studio.

Hyvo.ai is an all-in-one streaming platform that combines a professional in-browser studio (WebRTC capture, scene manager, audio mixer, multi-platform relay) with 11 AI features (title and thumbnail generation, chat moderation, highlight clips, game coaching, predictive analytics, voice assistant, viewer Q&A, and more). Available as a web app and a native desktop application for Windows and macOS.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and call to action.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Starter, Pro ($15/mo), and Year One ($30/yr) plans with a 14-day free trial.
- [Download](/download): Desktop installers for Windows and macOS.
- [Community](/community): Creator community and showcase.
- [Growth](/growth): Growth tips and playbooks for streamers.
- [Changelog](/changelog): Release notes and platform updates.
- [Native](/native): Native device features (camera, haptics, notifications, geolocation).

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Account access for existing users.
